'''vobabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:obclavate|obclavate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obclavate|obclavate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vobabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobabithi|vobabithi]] || [[word:vobabiji|vobabiji]] || [[word:vobabishi|vobabishi]] || [[word:vobabiki|vobabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobabuthuthu|vobabuthuthu]] || [[word:vobabujuju|vobabujuju]] || [[word:vobabushushu|vobabushushu]] || [[word:vobabukuku|vobabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobabuthu|vobabuthu]] || [[word:vobabuju|vobabuju]] || [[word:vobabushu|vobabushu]] || [[word:vobabuku|vobabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobabufthuf|vobabufthuf]] || [[word:vobabufjuf|vobabufjuf]] || [[word:vobabufshuf|vobabufshuf]] || [[word:vobabufkuf|vobabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobabethe|vobabethe]] || [[word:vobabeje|vobabeje]] || [[word:vobabeshe|vobabeshe]] || [[word:vobabeke|vobabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobabothotho|vobabothotho]] || [[word:vobabojojo|vobabojojo]] || [[word:vobaboshosho|vobaboshosho]] || [[word:vobabokoko|vobabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobabotho|vobabotho]] || [[word:vobabojo|vobabojo]] || [[word:vobabosho|vobabosho]] || [[word:vobaboko|vobaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobabofthof|vobabofthof]] || [[word:vobabofjof|vobabofjof]] || [[word:vobabofshof|vobabofshof]] || [[word:vobabofkof|vobabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfthĂŻf|vobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfjĂŻf|vobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfshĂŻf|vobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfkĂŻf|vobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vobabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vobabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vobabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vobabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfthĂŻf|vobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfjĂŻf|vobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfshĂŻf|vobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfkĂŻf|vobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfthĂŻf|vobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfjĂŻf|vobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfshĂŻf|vobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vobabĂŻfkĂŻf|vobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobabĂŠthĂŠ|vobabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vobabĂŠjĂŠ|vobabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vobabĂŠshĂŠ|vobabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vobabĂŠkĂŠ|vobabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobabathatha|vobabathatha]] || [[word:vobabajaja|vobabajaja]] || [[word:vobabashasha|vobabashasha]] || [[word:vobabakaka|vobabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobabatha|vobabatha]] || [[word:vobabaja|vobabaja]] || [[word:vobabasha|vobabasha]] || [[word:vobabaka|vobabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobabafthaf|vobabafthaf]] || [[word:vobabafjaf|vobabafjaf]] || [[word:vobabafshaf|vobabafshaf]] || [[word:vobabafkaf|vobabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vobabasha|vobabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobabshĂ«sha|vobabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobabrosha|vobabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobabmusha|vobabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobabyasha|vobabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobabnkshĂ«sha|govobabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobabnkrosha|govobabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobabnkmusha|govobabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobabnkyasha|govobabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vobababasha|vobababasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobababshĂ«sha|vobababshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobababrosha|vobababrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobababmusha|vobababmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobababyasha|vobababyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobababnkshĂ«sha|govobababnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobababnkrosha|govobababnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobababnkmusha|govobababnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobababnkyasha|govobababnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vebĂŠbasha|vebĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vebĂŠbshĂ«sha|vebĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vebĂŠbrosha|vebĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vebĂŠbmusha|vebĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vebĂŠbyasha|vebĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govebĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|govebĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govebĂŠbnkrosha|govebĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govebĂŠbnkmusha|govebĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govebĂŠbnkyasha|govebĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vobfabasha|vobfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobfabshĂ«sha|vobfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobfabrosha|vobfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobfabmusha|vobfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobfabyasha|vobfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobfabnkshĂ«sha|govobfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobfabnkrosha|govobfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobfabnkmusha|govobfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobfabnkyasha|govobfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
